scenarios.title: Reachable proxy provider-route failure falls back to the same provider

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Regression BUG-004: proxy HTTP failure falls back once to same-provider local key
plannedRegressions.discriminator: The health probe succeeds and parameterized non-2xx responses include 503 PROVIDER_KEY_MISSING; only the registered same-provider direct host returns the distinct expected structure.

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Regression BUG-004: proxy transport rejection falls back once to same-provider local key
plannedRegressions.discriminator: The injected proxy provider fetch rejects; production providerFetch makes one same-provider direct attempt and surfaces no raw transport error.

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Regression BUG-004: proxy timeout rejection falls back once to same-provider local key
plannedRegressions.classification: functional deterministic timer and external boundary
plannedRegressions.discriminator: The additive loadRldata timer/abort seam observes fetchT timeout rejection and production providerFetch makes one same-provider direct attempt.

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Regression BUG-004: proxy JSON decode failure falls back once to same-provider local key
plannedRegressions.discriminator: The proxy response is HTTP-successful but json() rejects; production providerFetch makes one same-provider direct attempt and returns its parsed structure.

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Regression BUG-004: fallback never crosses provider or retries
plannedRegressions.discriminator: Multiple local provider keys exist, but request history contains one proxy route and at most one direct request to the originally requested provider's registered host.

scenarios.title: Proxy provider-route failure without a local key remains fail closed

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Regression BUG-004: proxy failure without a local key makes no direct request
plannedRegressions.discriminator: The proxy route returns 503 PROVIDER_KEY_MISSING while no same-provider key exists; any direct request, cross-provider key use, or unsanitized error fails the test.

scenarios.title: Force-local bypasses a reachable proxy provider route

plannedRegressions.testTitle: SCN-BUG004-003 force-local uses the shared direct provider path
SCN-BUG004-003 force-local status stays masked with a reachable local proxy
plannedRegressions.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/provider-fallback-status.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "SCN-BUG004-003 force-local status stays masked with a reachable local proxy" --reporter=list
plannedRegressions.classification: e2e-ui local browser/application plus loopback HTTP proxy-health server
plannedRegressions.coverageBoundary: Browser settings, force-local control, masked provider status, and no-disclosure surfaces only.

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Broad Regression E2E UI: complete BUG-004 no-interception browser file
plannedRegressions.classification: e2e-ui broad local browser/application plus loopback HTTP proxy-health server
plannedRegressions.coverageBoundary: Complete BUG-004 no-interception browser file; no external-provider transport claim.

scenarios.title: Unknown and prototype-shaped providers remain inert

linkedTests.testId: SCN-BUG002-004 fail-closed transport and prototype-safe unknown providers
linkedTests.requiredAssertion: Unknown, empty, toString, constructor, __proto__, and prototype identifiers reject without config, transport, or built-in prototype mutation.
